compose.content:
version: "3.9"
services:
  i2pd:
    image: ghcr.io/purplei2p/i2pd:2.54.0
    container_name: diagon-i2pd
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    command: ["/usr/sbin/i2pd", "--conf", "/etc/diagon/i2pd/i2pd.conf", "--tunconf", "/etc/diagon/i2pd/tunnels.conf"]
    volumes:
      - /etc/diagon/i2pd:/etc/diagon/i2pd:rw
      - /var/lib/diagon/i2pd:/var/lib/diagon/i2pd:rw
      - /var/log/diagon/i2pd:/var/log/diagon/i2pd:rw
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:7070/health >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 12

  paywall:
    image: ghcr.io/opd-ai/paywall:main
    container_name: diagon-paywall
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - /etc/diagon/compose/diagon-compose.env
    depends_on:
      i2pd:
        condition: service_healthy
    command: ["/usr/libexec/diagon/paywall", "--config", "/etc/diagon/paywall/config.yaml"]
    volumes:
      - /etc/diagon/paywall:/etc/diagon/paywall:rw
      - /var/lib/diagon/paywall:/var/lib/diagon/paywall:rw
      - /var/log/diagon/paywall:/var/log/diagon/paywall:rw
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:8081/healthz >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 12

  store:
    image: ghcr.io/opd-ai/store:main
    container_name: diagon-store
    restart: unless-stopped
    network_mode: host
    env_file:
      - /etc/diagon/compose/diagon-compose.env
    depends_on:
      i2pd:
        condition: service_healthy
      paywall:
        condition: service_healthy
    command: ["/usr/libexec/diagon/store", "--config", "/etc/diagon/store/config.yaml"]
    volumes:
      - /etc/diagon/store:/etc/diagon/store:rw
      - /var/lib/diagon/store:/var/lib/diagon/store:rw
      - /var/log/diagon/store:/var/log/diagon/store:rw
      - /run/secrets:/run/secrets:ro
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 1"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 2s
      retries: 12

# Startup order contract
# - i2pd
# - paywall
# - store

environment_template.content:
# Diagon fallback compose environment template
# Copy to /etc/diagon/compose/diagon-compose.env and fill required values.
PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_PASSWORD=<required>
PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_USER=<required>
STORE_SESSION_SECRET_FILE=/run/secrets/store-session-secret
PAYWALL_WALLET_MODE=stubbed
PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:18089/json_rpc
STORE_PAYWALL_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:8081/api/v1/payments

systemd_unit.content:
[Unit]
Description=Diagon fallback compose stack
After=network-online.target docker.service
Wants=network-online.target
Requires=docker.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
RemainAfterExit=yes
WorkingDirectory=/opt/diagon/compose
ExecStart=/usr/bin/docker compose --env-file /etc/diagon/compose/diagon-compose.env -f /opt/diagon/compose/compose.yaml up -d
ExecStop=/usr/bin/docker compose --env-file /etc/diagon/compose/diagon-compose.env -f /opt/diagon/compose/compose.yaml down
TimeoutStartSec=180
TimeoutStopSec=120

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

manual_install_guide.content:
# Diagon Debian Fallback Compose Bundle

This interim bundle is used when full Debian packaging cannot be shipped on schedule.

## Files

- compose: `/opt/diagon/compose/compose.yaml`
- environment template: `/etc/diagon/compose/diagon-compose.env.example`
- systemd unit: `/etc/systemd/system/diagon-compose.service`
- manual guide: `/opt/diagon/compose/MANUAL-INSTALL.md`

## Startup Sequence

- i2pd
- paywall
- store
- diagonctl

## Manual Install Steps

1. Install Docker and Compose plugin on Debian: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin ca-certificates curl
2. Create runtime directories: sudo install -d -m 755 /opt/diagon/compose /etc/diagon/compose /etc/diagon/i2pd /etc/diagon/paywall /etc/diagon/store /var/lib/diagon /var/log/diagon
3. Write compose.yaml, diagon-compose.env, and diagon-compose.service to the emitted file paths
4. Create required secrets such as /run/secrets/store-session-secret and populate PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_USER/PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_PASSWORD
5. Reload systemd and start the stack: sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable --now diagon-compose.service
6. Validate health endpoints and tunnel listeners using the emitted validation checks

## Verification Commands

```bash
docker compose -f /opt/diagon/compose/compose.yaml config -q
systemctl is-active diagon-compose.service
nc -z 127.0.0.1:18080
nc -z 127.0.0.1:18081
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:7070/health
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8081/healthz
curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz
```

## Expected Tunnel Listeners

- `127.0.0.1:18080`
- `127.0.0.1:18081`

## Service Contract

- services: 3
- i2pd tunnels: 2
- integration environment: `debian-12`

manual_install_steps: Install Docker and Compose plugin on Debian: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin ca-certificates curl
Write compose.yaml, diagon-compose.env, and diagon-compose.service to the emitted file paths
Create required secrets such as /run/secrets/store-session-secret and populate PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_USER/PAYWALL_WALLET_RPC_PASSWORD
Reload systemd and start the stack: sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable --now diagon-compose.service
Validate health endpoints and tunnel listeners using the emitted validation checks
success_criteria: docker compose config validates the emitted compose bundle
i2pd, paywall, and store services start in dependency order
Store and Paywall local health endpoints return 2xx
i2pd tunnel listeners are reachable on the expected local ports
